description: Address review feedback: fix reorder section mismatch in full-screen view, consolidate normalizeTasks helper usage, add Create & Set Location button to FullTaskManager
steps: In src/App.jsx, modify reorderTask to accept a third parameter `partitionBy` with values 'section' (default) or 'group'. When partitionBy === 'group', partition tasks by (task.groupId || 'inbox') instead of getTaskSection(task).
In src/FullTaskManager.jsx, pass 'group' as the third argument when calling onReorderTask: onReorderTask(task.id, 'up', 'group') and onReorderTask(task.id, 'down', 'group').
In src/App.jsx, replace all inline normalization patterns with calls to the normalizeTasks helper function.
In src/FullTaskManager.jsx, update handleCreateTask to capture the return value from onAddTask and add a 'Create & Set Location' button that chains with onStartLocationSelection.
acceptance_criteria: reorderTask accepts optional third parameter partitionBy defaulting to 'section'
FullTaskManager passes 'group' as partitionBy to onReorderTask
normalizeTasks helper is called at all entry points instead of inline .map()
FullTaskManager has a 'Create & Set Location' button in the new task form
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run `npm run build` to confirm no compilation errors
findings: All three review issues addressed. reorderTask now accepts partitionBy parameter. normalizeTasks helper is called at all 4 entry points instead of inline. FullTaskManager has Create & Set Location button. Build passes.
